# Stage 1 — Build the wiki site
FROM squidfunk/mkdocs-material:latest AS builder

WORKDIR /build

# Install wiki plugins
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir \
    mkdocs-macros-plugin \
    python-dotenv \
    mkdocs-open-in-new-tab \
    mkdocs-git-revision-date-localized-plugin \
    mkdocs-git-committers-plugin-2 \
    mkdocs-glightbox \
    mkdocs-minify-plugin

# Copy wiki content and MkDocs config
COPY wiki/ wiki/
COPY wiki/mkdocs.yml mkdocs.yml

# Build the static site
# Note: git-committers requires GITHUB_TOKEN at build time
ARG GITHUB_TOKEN
ENV GITHUB_TOKEN=${GITHUB_TOKEN}
RUN mkdocs build --strict --site-dir /site

# Stage 2 — Serve with nginx
FROM nginx:alpine

# Remove default nginx page
RUN rm -rf /usr/share/nginx/html/*

# Copy built site from builder
COPY --from=builder /site /usr/share/nginx/html

# Copy custom nginx config
COPY nginx-wiki.conf /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf

EXPOSE 80

CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]
